title: Episode 26.81 - GDTG Gender Affirmation
author: 2026 Dr. Diana Sorrentino, Ph.D.
description:
Paradoxes of Gender Episode 26.81
Counseling Adolescent Youth for Gender Affirmation Counseling Youth for Hormone Therapy Youth Gender Affirmation & Gender Emergence Stages of the Youth’s Family’s Emergence Surgical Intervention for Gender Affirmation Pathways to Gender Affirmation – Surgical & Non-Surgical Societal & Family Issues Youth Gender Emergence in Academia or the Workplace    

Episode 26.81 Guest Amber Fourman.  Amber will share her experiences with gender incongruence, gender dysphoria, and her journey into and through Gender Affirmation.  

Paradoxes of Gender Podcasts: The Paradoxes of Gender Podcasts are Designed to Deliver Professional Development Educational Programs for the LGBTQ+ Medical & Behavioral Healthcare Providers who provide Medical & Behavioral Healthcare Services to Transgender, Gender Diverse, Gender Non-Conforming, Gender Incongruent and Non-Binary Individuals.  

Prepared & Presented by: Dr. Diana Sorrentino, Ph.D. Social-Psychologist & Behavioral Analyst   Delivering comprehensive Medical or Behavioral Healthcare Services as a component of your practice on behalf of Transgender (TG), Gender Diverse (GD) Individuals and members of the LGBTQ+ Community may at times prove to be a little challenging. The challenges you may experience have historically been caused by a lack of specialized medical or behavioral health training you received in preparation for your career and the care you will be providing for Transgender and Gender Diverse patients.   

This understanding was underscored and reinforced by a 2011 study, reported in the Journal of the American Medical Association, the medical schools, on average, only provide Five (5) hours of academic or clinical instruction on LGBTQ+ healthcare requirements.  In the absence of specialized training; time is required to acquire first-hand real-world knowledge and experience with the diverse challenges, needs and experiences these individuals present and what they are confronted with as they live their lives in their Self-Attributed Non-Conforming Gender roles.  

Transgender, Gender Diverse, Gender Non-Conforming, Gender Incongruent & Non-Binary individuals, their families, friends, schools, employers and social-networks will also benefit from the content of these Podcasts in-spite of the fact that the detailed medical and psychological content of these programs focuses on the continuing educational needs and requirements of the medical or behavioral healthcare professional.  Knowledge is essential to counteract the negative publicity and the political hyperbole disseminated by individuals with no understanding of the history and underlying biological factors influencing gender non-conformity.    

Dr. Sorrentino is a Member of: 
World Professional Association for Transgender Health
GLMA – Gay Lesbian Medical Association    

Copyright 2026 – All Rights Reserved
Paradoxes of Gender Podcasts are a Professional Production of Dr. Diana Sorrentino, Ph.D.

title: War Hall
author: War Hall
description:
WAR HALL: A Theatre of the Mind 


What was built during World War 2 — and why does it still matter now?


War Hall uncovers the remarkable wartime and musical history of Walthamstow Assembly Hall — a concert venue built in London during the Blitz. It became one of Britain’s most iconic recording spaces, known for its legendary acoustics.


The series blends immersive sound design, rare archives, and performances recorded in the Hall. Its original score is created by Simon Mills — acclaimed producer, composer, and one half of the pioneering electronic duo Bent — weaving past and present into a distinctive sonic world.


Pick of the week at The Guardian.


Hosted by Angela Allen MBE - a Londoner who lived through the air raids and one of Britain’s most respected script supervisors, with a career spanning from The Third Man to The Misfits — and historian Professor John Thomas.


WAR HALL asks what was built during the war, why it mattered, and what remains at risk today. It is a story about hope.


Additional sound by Ric Peet

author: @AllieSerea
description:
The life of your dreams is on the other side of sobriety. 
From being an anxious, depressed, & insecure party girl stuck in toxic cycles + full of pain and trauma, to a now regulated, powerful, aligned, abundant & magnetic version of myself I didn't know existed, I want everyone to step into their highest self & dream life. 
 
We are getting raw and real as I guide you through how to face your pain, limited beliefs, and addictive patterns, to allow you to step into a new state of peace, joy, confidence, and radiance to attract everything you want in this life.

title: Coughlin🔒Confidential
author: Coughlin
description:
Coughlin Confidential is a conversation series exploring the moments people think they know… and the stories behind them.
Where the official story ends… and the real one begins.

title: Maybe
author: Rob McLoughlin
description:
Maybe is a podcast about possibility, the choices that change us and the questions that lead us there. 
Each episode begins with a spark, a “maybe I should” or “maybe I could” moment that opens the door to something new. 
Through solo reflections and intimate conversations, Maybe explores how uncertainty becomes transformation. 
It’s about the delicate space between doubt and determination, and the courage to turn what‑ifs into what’s next.

title: Real Crime Tales
author: Gilbert Almonte
description:
Real Crime Tales goes beyond the crime.

Every case we cover — serial killers, fugitives, cold cases, and the criminals who hid in plain sight for decades — is examined through a single lens: not just what happened, but who had the chance to stop it, and why they didn't.

These are the stories of double lives carefully constructed over years. The charming GP who ended 215 of his patients' lives. The celebrated counterculture icon who hid his girlfriend's body in a trunk for 18 months. The dating show contestant the FBI had been hunting for years. The people who fooled everyone — and the systems that let them.

Every episode is built from court records, investigative journalism, police reports, and primary sources. No speculation dressed up as fact. No exploitation. The victims stay at the center of every story we tell.

This is true crime told the right way — accurate, thorough, and unafraid to ask the harder question underneath every case: how did we get here, and who left the door open?

New episodes every week.

Want early access and the fully uncensored version of every episode — with the precise language we have to soften for other platforms? Support the show on Patreon at patreon.com/cw/realcrimetales. Three dollars a month keeps this podcast independent.

title: عـــــندما يــــكون الحــــب ألــــــم💔
author: Riquilson
description:
Fī hādhā al-mashhad, yamurru al-ithnān bi-azmatin qawiyyatin fī ʿalāqatihimā. Sīrkān yusayṭiru ʿalayhi al-ghaḍab wa al-ya's, baynamā Īdā tashʿuru bijurḥin ʿamīqin wa alamin shadīd.
Ya'tī hādhā al-mashhad baʿda an marra al-ḥabībān bil-ʿadīd mina al-khilāfāt wal-infiṣālāt wa sūʾ al-fahm wal-khasāʾir. Wa mā zālā yuḥibbāni baʿḍahumā, lākin ath-thiqah baynahumā qad tazʿazaʿat, wa yuẓhiru hādhā ash-shijār ḥajm al-alam alladhī tarākama fī qalbayhimā.

title: B*tch, Please.
author: Plant & Georgia
description: A podcast about everything. From college athletics to friendships, funny stories, and everything in between, hosts Plant and Georgia laugh, cry, bicker, and overshare, but somehow it's always a good time.

title: The FlipSide Podcast
author: Chris Sun and Ryan Kearney
description: The FlipSide Podcast breaks down US-China business, technology, AI, investing, politics, and growth strategy. Hosted by Chris Sun, a Chinese founder and Stanford GSB alum based in Silicon Valley, and Ryan Kearney, an American entrepreneur and Sichuan University MBA based in Chengdu, China. Each week, they decode Chinese companies going global, U.S. startups and venture capital, AI competition, tariffs, cross-border trade, consumer brands, and social commerce.

title: slockes 2nd test show
author: me
description: test

title: Hidden Notebooks
author: Mel Rae
description:
Hidden Notebooks is a spoken word poetry podcast by poet Mel Rae. Each episode is a single original poem read aloud, nothing more. Genuine, nostalgic, and intimate, these are the poems that live in the margins, the ones written for no one and everyone at once.
If you love spoken word poetry, poetry readings, contemporary poetry, or just words that romanticize every part of life, this is for you. 
No commentary. Just words.

title: Navigating Dementia
author: Carlyn Lenfestey
description: Navigating Dementia is a weekly podcast for anyone caring for someone with dementia, family and professional caregivers alike. Host Carlyn Lenfestey, a physical therapist and dementia care specialist with 25 years of clinical experience, uses real stories and everyday moments to show that behavior is never the problem. It's always the signal. Each episode teaches one meaningful insight through her Wheel of Function Framework™, delivered like a conversation over coffee, not a lecture. There is always a better way.

title: ADieHD - Not another ADHD Podcast
author: Adie Wyper
description: If you’ve ever felt like a Lamborghini being driven as a delivery van - this is your podcast. We’re not talking about the clinical version or the Instagram version of ADHD where everyone’s suddenly got it. We are talking about the real version that messes with your brain every single day. Hosted by Adie, a working class Scottish dad with huge ambition and blocked by thick fog because of combined ADHD. Sound familiar? This is the ADHD podcast for real people. You forgot why you walked into this room, didn’t you? Welcome home.

title: Offroad Touring Life Podcast
author: Richard
description:
Join me as I dive into the real world of 4WD touring, remote Adventures and camping.

From the vehicles we use, the camping and touring set ups and more.

With special guests who will share there expertise and experiences from decades of knowledge.

title: Generational Divide
author: BTT Studios
description: New school debates old school on the biggest topics in sports. Coach defends the veterans while Peyton Lodge argues for the modern era — one divide, no middle ground.

title: History Klaxon
author: Christine Baker
description: Want to know more about History? Subscribe to History Klaxon! This is the podcast made from the History Klaxon youtube channel. This content is created by Christine Baker, a human with a PhD in Middle Eastern History who taught university-level classes for more than decade. There will never be any AI content on History Klaxon.

title: The Athlete's Porch
author: jonkarcich
description:
Welcome to The Athlete’s Porch.
Pull up a chair. This is where athletes, coaches, and competitors talk about what the game is really like. The wins, the setbacks, the pressure, the failures, the breakthroughs, and everything in between.
Just honest conversations, lessons learned, and stories that can help the next athlete on their journey.
Because the game doesn’t just build better players—it builds better people.
Play the Long Game.
Hosted by Jon Karcich.

title: Carriers for a Better Union
author: CBU
description: Just a couple of troublemakers from Texas

title: My Ministry, Your Business
author: Heidi
description: An inspirational podcast for faith-based business owners

title: Gfddd
author: joelma Silva
description:
Vamos ao nosso episódio feito com muito carinho e amor

Cover art photo provided by Hongjin Wang on Unsplash: https://unsplash.com/@wu_hua_jiang?utm_source=spreaker&utm_medium=referral

title: The Recovery Run
author: Arun Gray
description:
Whether you’re dealing with a running injury, trying to prevent one, or looking to run stronger for longer, The Recovery Run is here to help. Hosted by a sports therapist, each episode delivers practical, evidence-based advice on injury rehabilitation, strength training, running mechanics, and smarter training.
Most episodes are adapted from my YouTube channel, making it easy to learn wherever you are; on a run, in the car, or during recovery. Run healthier, recover smarter, and stay consistent.

title: Beyond The Bird Table
author: British Trust for Ornithology (BTO)
description:
The official podcast of the British Trust for Ornithology (BTO) where we delve deep into the bird world, with expert guests who shed light on the latest science, discoveries and concerns facing our much-loved birdlife.
Original music, titled Over Winter, composed and recorded by Martin Noble from the band Sea Power.
BTO promotes and encourages the wider understanding, study, appreciation and conservation of birds. 
Registered Charity no. 216652 (England & Wales) no. SCO39193

title: MY ENCOUNTER WITH GOD
author: Dr. Washington
description: Talks about how one met God.

title: Spandan Mondal's Discovering Out
author: Spandan Mondal
description:
The Incoming 20 years it set to a big milestone for India globally with a flow of various opportunities but forthat you have tobe ready yourself towin these moments but if your don't then you will lose it and we won't let it happen,this channel is about to show the path toward the best in world.
Hi! I am Spandan Mondal and I keep faith in 'Discovering Out' how to grow every single day, week, month and year so that you so that you discover better and do your best in life.
Our purpose for this channel is to become one of the most trustworthy and instructive guide to what is going in each
Sector.

title: NAME DROP, ME? NEVER!
author: Sebastian Wocker
description:
A mischievous new monthly podcast featuring well known broadcasters, actors, musicians, comedians and footballers, where no one is spared from the dreaded name-drop. 
Based on the book of the same name, author Sebastian Wocker invites various stars to discuss their heroes and how the double-edged sword of fame has affected them. Expect some colourful language, touching moments and hilariously cringeworthy stories.

title: Boylan Point
author: Daniel Boylan
description: Weekly podcast from Belfast’s Daniel Boylan and his pop culture hot-takes. Everything from music to memes - and opinions that no one asked for, but you’re hearing anyway. New episodes whenever he wants to upload one.

title: Sew Tell Me
author: Sew Centre LTD
description: Sew Tell Me is the official podcast from Sew Centre Ltd, bringing you conversations about sewing machines, accessories, techniques, as well as a peek behind the curtain of the sewing industry. With expert insights, helpful tips, and special guests, it's the perfect listen for sewing enthusiasts of all levels.

title: BBR Athletics Podcast
author: Rocco DiGerlando
description: Fitness Trainer & Nutrition Coach, Rocco DiGerlando, talks about 20+ years in the fitness industry. Frequently joined by other coaches and athletes, Rocco talks bodybuilding, competitive sports, and health/nutrition

title: The Prompt & The Pitch
author: The Prompt & The Pitch
description:
Advertising is entering its agentic era, and most of the industry hasn't caught up yet. The Prompt & The Pitch is here to close that gap.
Hosted by Sean Halpin and Cameron Armstro, the show runs a simple weekly rhythm: Monday breaks down the week's biggest advertising and media stories through the lens of agentic AI and what's actually changing and Friday brings on an industry expert to talk candidly about how professionals and businesses advance as the industry transforms.
Built for advertising and media professionals who want to understand and get ahead of the next era of the industry.

title: The Crafted Husband
author: Robert Hughes
description:
Welcome to The Crafted Husband, a Christian husband podcast dedicated to helping men build stronger marriages, lead their families with confidence, and grow in their walk with Christ.
Every episode offers practical marriage advice for men rooted in Scripture, covering topics like communication, servant leadership, conflict resolution, fatherhood, faith, and what it means to pursue Biblical marriage in today's world. Whether you're newly married, raising a family, or simply striving to become the husband God has called you to be, you'll find honest conversations and Biblical encouragement to help you take your next step.
If you're looking to become a stronger Christian husband, develop husband leadership that reflects Christ, and build a thriving Christian marriage, you're in the right place. Subscribe and join a community of men committed to loving their wives well, leading with humility, and crafting a marriage that honors God—one conversation at a time.

title: Lubinski's Daily Dose
author: Jim Lubinski
description: Daily update on the world of Endurance Sport with Training Tips, Hot Topics, Race Updates....all with an entertaining twist.

title: Deeds and Dealings
author: Rocky Ramon
description:
What happens after the players close the box?

A TTRPG actual-play set in Monopolis, a city where your worth is a number the Church assigns you, a wall divides those who have a good number from everyone who doesn't, and 3 people are about to start pulling threads and asking questions. Inspired by Dimension 20 and loosely built on the Kids on Bikes system. New episodes every month. Find the full game on itch.io or hate capitalism on our discord 

https://arcastane.itch.io/deeds-and-dealings

https://discord.gg/mqJc4DyRY

https://buymeacoffee.com/rcastane892

title: The Nicholas Bowling Podcast
author: Nicholas Bowling
description: A child of God encouraging others to walk as Jesus walked.

title: The Garden
author: The Garden
description: Two best friends share a heartfelt study of scripture as they grow closer to the Lord together. Inspired by the Garden of Eden and finding a "secret place" to be with the Lord, this podcast invites you to bloom in faith, friendship, and purpose—cultivating a life rooted in God’s word and blossoming into the garden He designed us to be.

title: Unmasked & Unscripted
author: Summit Family Therapy, PLLC
description: Unmasked and Unscripted is where neurodivergence meets real life. Join Kate, Nate, and Brandon, three neurodivergent therapists, as they sit down for honest, unscripted conversations about the stuff we don't talk about enough: masking, burnout, executive dysfunction, sensory overload, late diagnoses, and what it actually looks like to live in a world that wasn't built for our brains. It's part therapy chat, part storytelling, part tangent filled rabbit hole, and always real. So get comfy, take a deep breath, and come hang out with us. You're not broken, and you're definitely not

title: Catalyst Wealth Advisory: Life & Money Unlocked
author: Catalyst Wealth Advisory
description:
Welcome to the Catalyst Wealth Advisory Podcast - where meaningful conversations and trusted financial guidance come together to help individuals and families build lasting confidence in their financial future.
On this podcast, you’ll hear practical conversations around retirement planning, investing, legacy strategies, financial decision-making, and navigating life’s biggest milestones with clarity and confidence. Episodes feature a rotating group of advisors from the Catalyst team, each bringing unique experiences and perspectives to the conversation.
Whether you’re preparing for retirement, growing your wealth, or simply looking to make smarter financial decisions, our goal is to help turn complexity into confidence.
Investment advisory products and services made available through Impact Partnership Wealth, LLC ("IPW"), a Registered Investment Adviser. 5530157-06/26

title: Stubblefields Set Free
author: Harrison and Miriam Stubblefield
description:
Stubblefields Set Free is a Christ-centered podcast hosted by husband and wife, Miriam Blessing Stubblefield and Harrison Francis Stubblefield. Through raw testimony, biblical truth, and Spirit-led conversation, we share how Jesus Christ has brought freedom to every area of our lives—marriage, identity, faith, culture, calling, healing, and obedience.
Born and raised in Zimbabwe and Liberia, and now walking out our faith in America, we bring a global, faith-filled perspective rooted in Scripture and anchored in God’s redeeming power. This podcast is not about us—it’s about what the Lord has done and continues to do when we surrender fully to Him.
Each episode is an invitation to witness God’s transforming work, break chains, and boldly declare His goodness—because when the Son sets you free, freedom is not partial… it is complete.
🎧 Listen. Be encouraged. Be set free.

title: Wendigoon Podcast
author: Wendigoon
description: Welcome to the audio home of Wendigoon. Dive deep into the strange, the creepy, and the unexplained. Join us as we explore the world's most mysterious conspiracy theories, examine complex 'iceberg' charts, analyze chilling analog horror series, and take a look at dark moments in history. Whether you are driving, working, or just relaxing, plug in your headphones and enjoy these long-form, campfire-style deep dives into the unknown. New episodes uploaded regularly. Don't forget to follow so you never miss a mystery.

title: Tarzan Triumphant (Adventures in the Jungle)
author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
description:
When Gunner Patrick, an ex-gunman on the run from Chicago's gangland—stumbles into a hidden valley, he never expects to encounter a world where danger lurks at every turn. Alongside the unsuspecting geologist Lafayette Smith, Gunner finds not only the thrill of adventure but also the enchanting Lady Barbara Collis, an aviatrix lost in the depths of the jungle. The trio soon realizes they are not alone; they must navigate the treacherous terrain and the secrets of a tribe that believes in ancient myths and powerful rituals.

As they delve deeper into this uncharted territory, the stakes rise with each step. Gunner battles his own demons, while Lafayette's scientific mind clashes with the mystical beliefs of the Midianites surrounding them. Lady Barbara's resourcefulness and determination become their lifeline, but can they trust Jezebel, the beautiful young Midianite, whose loyalties remain shrouded in mystery?

In 'Tarzan Triumphant,' Edgar Rice Burroughs weaves a gripping tale of survival, friendship, and the clash between civilization and the wild. With rich characters and riveting twists, this audiobook invites listeners to join an unforgettable journey through a jungle filled with peril and wonder. Prepare for a breathtaking adventure that explores the limits of loyalty, the depth of courage, and the bonds formed in the face of adversity. Will they escape the jungle's grasp, or will they become part of its legends?

title: Cacao Time
author: New Earth Collective NZ
description: New Earth Collective brings you chats over ceremonial cacao covering the big questions on life, healing, different perspectives, spirituality and everything in between. Kelly, Ruth and Simon explore these topics providing tools that they use on the daily.

title: GuildCast
author: Shawn
description: Celebrating the past, present, and future of Guild Wars.

title: The Power of Connection
author: Bobby Umar
description:
Conversations on leadership, storytelling, and staying human in a noisy world.


I'm Bobby Umar. 5x TEDx speaker, Inc Magazine Top 100 Leadership Speaker, and 2x LinkedIn Top Voice. For 25 years I've spoken on stages across 4 continents about the one thing that actually drives careers, businesses, and lives: the power of connection.


This show is where influence gets human again. Each episode gives you one big idea and something you can use right away, whether that's telling stories that move people, building a personal brand rooted in who you really are, becoming a thought leader without becoming a performer, or leading with the kind of vulnerability that builds real trust.


Expect solo teaching sessions, masterclasses with brilliant guest experts, and honest conversations about what it takes to be seen, heard, and remembered.

If you're a leader, entrepreneur, speaker, or anyone building something that depends on people trusting you, this show is for you.


New episodes weekly. Let's get into it.

title: Grit City Growing Pains
author: Kylie Jo
description: Conversations about the grit it takes to grow through what you go through in any city.

title: Feel Fabulous with Ru-tee Podcast
author: Ru-tee Block
description:
Feel Fabulous with Ru-tee is the podcast for women going through and beyond menopause who refuse to believe their best years are behind them.
Hosted by holistic wellness coach, kinesiologist and personal trainer Ru-tee, with over 30 years of experience supporting women through some of the biggest transitions of their lives, this show is your weekly dose of real talk, inspiration and practical wisdom for navigating perimenopause and menopause on your own terms.
Each episode covers everything from hormone health and nutrition to nervous system healing, confidence, spirituality and deep self-love. Ru-tee brings her warmth, her humour and her no-nonsense Costa Rica energy to every conversation, because women deserve a space that feels like a hug and a kick up the backside all at once.
Menopause is not the end of your story. It is the beginning of the most powerful chapter you have ever lived.

title: Steadfast “Biblical Truth. Daily Encouragement. Unshakable Hope.”
author: Natalie Joyce Garcia
description:
Steadfast is your daily source of biblical encouragement and hope. Through Scripture-based messages, practical wisdom, and faith-filled motivation, each episode will help you grow closer to God, overcome life’s challenges, and stand firm in His promises.
Together, we’ll explore Scripture, grow in faith, build resilience through Christ, and discover the peace that comes from trusting God’s promises—even when life feels uncertain.
Biblical Truth. Daily Encouragement. Unshakable Hope.

title: Plagues with Dr. Keith
author: Keith Sumey, MD
description: Exploring the science, history and sociology of the most significant diseases and pandemics throughout human history. Keith Sumey, MD will give insight, through the lens of an ER physician, of how disease impacts humanity.

title: Hoops Across The Pond
author: Gracie Killey and Kate Sherman
description:
Hoops Across the Pond is an independent WNBA podcast bringing women’s basketball conversations from a UK and international fan perspective. 
Hosted by Gracie and Kate, the show explores the games, players, storylines, debates, culture, and community surrounding the WNBA — while asking what it really means to support the league from across the pond.
From 3am tip-offs and hot takes to guest conversations with fans around the world, Hoops Across the Pond is here to connect women’s basketball fans wherever they’re watching from.
Independent fan media. Not affiliated with the WNBA.

title: Curious Kids
author: Curious Kids
description: Curious Kids is a fun, kid-friendly podcast that explores big questions about science, nature, and the world around us. Each short episode helps curious minds ask, learn, and discover something new.

title: Raccoon Energy
author: Raccoon Energy
description:
A podcast for those who know there's more to life than what we're being sold.


Dr. Hilary Agro and Maria Cheung talk about reconnecting with your humanity, composting what isn’t yours, and reclaiming what is—together.


Rooted. Remembering. Wielding.

title: Broken Bow Tapes
author: John P. Williams
description: Broken Bow Tapes is a storytelling podcast about Missouri fiddling. Each episode explores the people, tunes, recordings, and traditions that shaped the music, from legendary fiddlers to forgotten cassettes, old LPs, and kitchen jams. If you enjoy old-time music and the stories that bring it to life.

title: GRACE ANGLICAN FELLOWSHIP - Audio Sermons
author: Grace Anglican Fellowship
description: Audio Sermons

title: Use of modal verbs. Daniela Díaz Rudas
author: DANIELA DIAZ
description:
This is my oral presentation about attitudes, belliefs, and obligations. 
Thank you!

title: The Spirit Meat Devotional
author: Sola Areogun Ministries
description: Spirit Meat is a Christian devotional dedicated to sharing daily Bible-based teachings that help believers grow in faith, spiritual maturity, purpose, and practical godly living.

title: Matters Arising
author: Nova Audio
description:
Lower Clumpthorpe is the quintessential English village. 
Quiet, cosy, quaint, it's the picture of rural harmony. 
And it is presided over by the fine, upstanding citizens of the Lower Clumpthorpe Parish Council - those tireless champions who generously devote their free time to the betterment of the community. 
Professional, conscientious, and absolutely not involved in any gossip, 
A comedy of small minds in a small village, where the only thing greater than the scenery is the epic proportions of parish politics.

title: Put Good In
author: Becky Paulson
description: This podcast highlights the good in the world. Episodes focus on positive stories and ways to add goodness to your life, your family and your world.

title: First Press
author: First Press
description:
First Press is a casual, conversation‑driven, insider’s look at the people, business, and culture of wine. Hosted from the heart of Napa Valley by three wine industry professionals, the show explores what we know, and what we’re learning, about the world of wine.

Each episode blends real world vineyard experience, financial insight, and storytelling from the cellar to the boardroom. Whether you work in wine, dream about wine, or simply love learning what’s in your glass, First Press is your front row seat to the world’s most fascinating agricultural industry.

title: TuNicaPass Travel Podcast
author: Ace
description:
Planning a trip to Nicaragua? TuNicaPass Travel Podcast gives you practical local travel tips in short, easy-to-follow episodes.
Hosted by Ace from TuNicaPass, the show shares honest advice, local insight, cultural context, travel stories, and practical information to help you understand Nicaragua beyond the usual tourist advice.
Whether you’re visiting for a few days or staying longer, this podcast helps you travel smarter, feel more prepared, and enjoy Nicaragua with more confidence.

title: Two Topics Ahead
author: Alex Harvey
description:
The latest news on the impact of Artificial Intelligence on society.
Every morning, two stories. One theme. And a fresh way to think about the world AI is building around us.
Two Topics Ahead isn't a tech show. It's a storytelling show that happens to be about AI. Host Alex Harvey picks two of the most interesting AI stories of the day — from business, society, culture, work — and tells them the way a curious, well-read friend would: over coffee, no jargon, no hype.
If you've ever wondered what AI is actually doing to jobs, creativity, healthcare, education, or the way companies make decisions — and you want someone to explain it without making you feel like you need an engineering degree — this is your show.

title: Carrying Hope with Sibu
author: Sibulele Nomnganga
description:
Carrying Hope with Sibu is my show about navigating the unseen journey to conception, the grief, the waiting, the moments that don't make it onto anyone's highlight reel. I bring in real people to tell the full story of what the fertility path actually looks like. It's built for hopeful women, men, and couples who need to hear that their experience has a name.
Most people smile and say 'just keep trying,' and I wanted to make a show that goes deeper than that. Each conversation brings you closer to feeling less alone on the path to conception. I've walked the unseen journey to conception myself, and I know how isolating it can feel when you're navigating infertility. That's why I've created this platform, a space where your reproductive health journey isn't just acknowledged, it's held with care and community.
Join us as we explore what it means to carry hope through the hardest seasons.

title: The Rusty Nail - Days Gone By 6"
author: Rob Norwood
description: The people places and things that made the 1960's and 70's the decades of memories rolls on!  Enjoy more of the nostalgia in this podcast as we bring back some of the forgotten things.  Enjoy!

title: FOCUSED365 WITH PARIS HOUGH
author: Paris Hough
description:
Focused365 Podcast with Paris Hough


Welcome to the Focused365 Podcast, where we apply biblical truth to real life. Each episode offers practical coaching, biblical teaching, and encouragement to help you strengthen your faith, discover your purpose, grow in character, lead with confidence, and build healthy relationships.


Whether you're navigating everyday challenges or simply want to grow closer to God, you'll find encouragement, wisdom, and practical next steps you can apply immediately.


Real Faith. Real Life. Real Transformation.


📱 Download the FREE Focused365 App for daily Bible teaching, devotionals, and coaching.


🌐 Learn more at Focused365.com


Join the Focused365 community and start your journey of learning God's Word and living it every day.


Focused365 | Learn It. Live It.


Focused365.com
ParisHough.com

title: Spiritual Insights for Challenging Times
author: Bri Campano - Producer
description: Spiritual Insights for Challenging Times is a podcast hosted by Reverend Ellen Barron, offering spiritual wisdom, meaningful conversations, and practical insights to help you navigate life’s challenges with greater peace, courage, and hope. Through reflections, guest conversations, and spiritual practices, Ellen invites listeners to reconnect with the strength, guidance, and light within.

title: Coolest Person I Know Podcast
author: Sajag Agarwal, Jake Geddas
description: Coolest Person I Know is a New York City interview podcast hosted by Sajag and Jake. Each episode, they sit down with one genuinely fascinating person from their combined world — chefs, restaurateurs, club and nightlife operators, pro athletes, musicians, and the characters who give the city its energy — and go hunting for the one story nobody else gets them to tell. Part back-room-of-a-great-bar hang, part real curiosity, always the story behind the story. New full episodes every other week.

title: Boring History for Sleep by Sleepy Time History
author: Sleepy Time History
description:
Long-form history documentaries made for sleep. Explore prehistoric mysteries, lost civilizations, and the strangest chapters of the human story — all narrated in a calm, relaxing tone.
Each episode runs 2+ hours, perfect for a full night's rest. No ads interrupting your sleep. Just history, told softly, until you drift off.

title: I Have To Speak (ericrogersphd.com)
author: DrEricRogers
description:
I Have To Speak is a thought-provoking podcast where Dr. Eric Rogers explores the real issues that shape our lives, challenge our beliefs, and influence our communities. Through insightful commentary, meaningful conversations, and practical wisdom, this broadcast addresses the topics many people are thinking about—but few are willing to discuss openly.

Each episode examines today's most significant personal, social, cultural, educational, and spiritual issues with honesty, compassion, and intellectual depth. Whether discussing family dynamics, relationships, mental health, grief and healing, leadership, education, faith, current events, or personal growth, Dr. Rogers provides listeners with balanced perspectives, evidence-based insights, and practical strategies for living healthier, stronger, and more purposeful lives.

Drawing upon decades of experience as a professor, psychotherapist, health educator, author, and speaker, Dr. Rogers brings together research, life experience, and timeless principles to help listeners navigate the complexities of modern life.

Topics include:

  • Culture and society
  • Family and parenting
  • Marriage and healthy relationships
  • Mental health and emotional wellness
  • Grief, trauma, and healing
  • Physical health and wellness
  • Faith and spirituality
  • Leadership and personal development
  • Higher education and lifelong learning
  • Current events and social issues
  • Community advocacy
  • Purpose, resilience, and hope

Whether you're seeking answers, encouragement, inspiration, or simply a fresh perspective, I Have To Speak offers authentic conversations that educate, empower, and inspire meaningful change.

Because some conversations cannot wait... and some truths simply have to be spoken.

Join Dr. Eric Rogers each week as we explore life, challenge perspectives, inspire hope, and engage in conversations that matter.

"I Have To Speak"—Where Truth Meets Life, and Every Conversation Has Purpose.

title: European Defence & Security Conference Series
author: European Defence and Security Conference
description:
The European Defence & Security Conference podcast is our latest project that brings together and creates informal discussions between the sector's leading voices from the industry, institutions and Member States ahead of the 6th European Defence and Security Conference. Listen as we delve into the European Union's strategic ambitions and evolution of the European defence industry policy amidst a challenging geopolitical landscape.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: The Simply Devoted Podcast
author: Heath Dotson
description: The Simply Devoted Podcast is a place for honest conversations about faith, life, and following Jesus. Each episode features real people sharing their stories, struggles, victories, and the moments that shaped their walk with God. Whether you're new to faith or have been serving God for years, our goal is simple: to encourage you to stay devoted to Christ in everyday life.

title: Bad Dog House Podcast

title: In Discussion with ACEC
author: Association of Consulting Engineering Companies - Canada
description:
How are infrastructure decisions shaping our economy—and who’s making them? In Discussion with ACEC goes straight to the source.

Hosted by John Gamble, President and CEO of the Association of Consulting Engineering Companies, this podcast features candid conversations with government officials on the policies, investments, and decisions influencing infrastructure across Canada. From economic growth and public policy to the evolving role of the consulting engineering sector, each episode breaks down complex issues and explains what they mean for communities, industry, and the future.

If you want informed insights, practical perspectives, and a clearer understanding of how infrastructure drives the nation forward, this is the discussion you won’t want to miss.

Coming spring 2026, follow us now so you don’t miss episode one, dropping.

title: America: The Story of the USA
author: Liam Heffernan  |  A Mercury Podcast
description:
This is your deep‑dive guide to how the United States became what it is today - politically, culturally, and socially. We unpack the pivotal moments, defining conflicts, influential leaders, and overlooked voices that shaped, and continue to shape, the nation’s identity.

Designed for curious listeners, students, educators, and lifelong learners, this series blends accessible storytelling with historically grounded insight to help you understand not just what happened in America’s past, but why it still matters now.

If you want a clear, compelling, and richly narrated journey through U.S. history, this is the podcast that brings the American story to life. Made in partnership with the British Association for American Studies. . JOIN THE COMMUNITY: https://sotus.beehiiv.com/community

GET THE NEWSLETTER: https://sotus.beehiiv.com/

BRANDS & ADVERTISING: liam@mercurypodcasts.com

title: Bushey Baptist Sermons
author: Bushey Baptist Church
description:
Each week you’ll find biblical preaching from Bushey Baptist Church in Hertfordshire, helping people encounter Jesus, be formed by his Spirit, and live as his faithful apprentices in everyday life.
Our sermons seek to explain Scripture clearly, apply it faithfully, and point to the hope of the gospel. Whether you’re exploring the Christian faith, new to church, or have been following Jesus for many years, we hope these messages encourage you to know Christ more deeply and follow him more closely.
To find out more about Bushey Baptist Church, join us on a Sunday, or discover what’s happening

title: The 21st Region - Italy’s Many Identities
author: Camilla Vai
description:
Italy has twenty regions on the map. The 21st Region is the one carried around the world by the people who leave.
Hosted by Camilla, an Italian living in Ireland, this podcast explores Italy beyond the postcard: culture, identity, migration, belonging, regional differences, family stories, language, food, stereotypes and nostalgia.
A podcast about the Italy we come from, the Italy we explain to others, and the Italy we carry with us.

title: Voices of Unity
author: Mujib Abid
description: Voices of Unity is a grassroots 'walk and talk' storytelling podcast highlighting everyday practices of peace, care and social connection across Melbourne. Each episode features a short, reflective conversation with an everyday peacebuilder: a community organiser, artist, educator, volunteer, neighbour, carer, faith leader or resident whose actions contribute, often quietly and without recognition, to the social fabric of the city.

description: Storytowns create geo-located podcast app for the self-drive tourism market. Download the app "Storytowns" to access all the features.

Hello World! Bartie’s Wanderlogue is a space for conversations about travel experiences, current events, and fitting adventure into it all.
A Barter’s Travelnet podcast.

www.travelnet.ie

title: Back Pocket
author: Back Pocket
description: Back Pocket is a video game variety channel starring Gus Ronald, Peter Burns, Ruby Innes, Joshua Swift, Adele Jefferies, and William Yates! Here you'll find the audio-only version of their weekly flagship program, where they cover the latest gaming news, share first impressions of new game releases, and have a nice time all around. You'll also find every episode of our old podcast PocketBuds, where good buds talk about good gaming stuff.

title: Mysteries of Black Holes 101
author: Inception Point AI
description:
Exploring the Mysteries of Black Holes: A 101 Guide
Embark on a captivating journey through the universe with Cosmic Curiosities. Join your cosmic guide as we explore the most intriguing and mind-bending phenomena in space. From the mysterious allure of black holes to the dance of galaxies and the secrets of time, each episode delves into a different cosmic wonder. No need to be an astronaut – just bring your curiosity and get ready to uncover the universe's most fascinating secrets. Subscribe now to embark on a voyage of discovery that will leave you starry-eyed and craving more cosmic curiosities.
This content was created in partnership and with the help of Artificial Intelligence AI.

title: Pitch In
author: CBAA
description:
Pitch In, hosted by Lehmo, is a podcast that explores the people who make community sport possible. While the moments on the field often steal the spotlight, this series uncovers the stories behind the game - of the volunteers whose dedication keeps clubs alive, strengthens communities and creates places where people belong.
Travelling across Australia, Pitch In meets the coaches, committee members, parents and local leaders who give their time not for recognition, but because they believe in the power of community. Through powerful conversations and deeply personal stories, the series reveals how volunteering in sport builds connection, resilience and purpose, and why local clubs remain at the heart of communities across the country.
More than a podcast about sport, Pitch In is a celebration of the people who show up, pitch in and make a lasting difference - revealing the human stories, quiet acts of generosity and lifelong commitment that sit at the heart of community sport in Australia.
Produced by Community Broadcasting Association of Australia
Host - Lehmo
Creative Producer – Eliza Hull
Producer – Megan Williams
Executive Producer – Matt Field
Video – Keiran Watson-Bonnice
Sound Recording and Mixing– Bruce Armstrong
Additional Sound Recording– Ed Denton
Music – James McGuffie
Supported by The Australian Government

title: The Next Big Thing: A Megatrends Podcast
author: WisdomTree
description: Megatrends are changing our world. We’ve seen the internet and smartphones transform our lives and, more recently, have seen artificial intelligence touted as ‘the next big thing’, with the emergence of software like ChatGPT. So, what’s next?

title: Real Asset Intelligence - Powered by UseNectar.com
author: Derrick Barker
description:
Asset Intelligence is a show about how AI and data are reshaping the way the real estate world values, manages, and grows its most important assets. 
Each episode, Derrick Barker sits down with the investors, operators, and builders actually putting these tools to work — cutting through the hype to what's real, what's working, and what's coming next.

title: The Examined Intelligence
author: Muneet Bakshi
description: The Examined Intelligence is a podcast by professionals who spent decades helping big companies wrangle their technology and figured the least they could do is help everyone else make sense of the AI wave before it makes sense of us. Each episode, we pick one idea at the intersection of AI and the real world (energy, healthcare, the law, your job) and talk it through with a balance of hard-won expertise and healthy skepticism. No computer science degree required. For show notes and more, check out https://limnintel.ai/podcast

title: Green Intelligence Podcast
author: Gaurav Vaid
description:
The Green Intelligence Podcast is the voice of a global, challenge-first innovation ecosystem.
Hosted and created by CEEDS, the podcast brings together leaders from industry, academia, entrepreneurship, investment, government and civil society to explore meaningful challenges—and the ecosystems required to solve them.
Because artificial intelligence helps us ask, “What can we do?”
Green Intelligence asks, “What do we care enough to do?”
Problems worth solving. Ecosystems worth building.

title: Whistle While You Plan
author: Raquel Regno Cusi
description: Plan your next Disney Day with me!

title: Same Table: Pull Up A Chair
author: Emma and James Hobbs
description: Same Table: Pull Up A Chair is hosted by father-daughter duo Emma & James Hobbs. Every week, they sit down to talk through their differences, their similarities, and everything in between — from politics and technology to parenting and pop culture — all in an attempt to fix themselves, each other, and maybe the country while they're at it.

title: The Charles Dudley Warner Library
author: Charles Dudley Warner
description:
There is a peculiar pleasure in keeping company with a thoughtful writer, especially one who never hurries his reader nor mistakes noise for wisdom. Charles Dudley Warner possessed that rare gift. Whether wandering through a garden, journeying abroad, recalling the delights of boyhood, or casting a kindly but discerning eye upon the follies of his age, he writes with wit, grace, and quiet good sense.

In this library you will find his works read in full, unabridged and unhurried, just as they were written to be enjoyed. Come for a chapter on a peaceful evening, or linger through an entire volume. You may discover that observations penned more than a century ago still bloom as freshly as a well-tended garden.

If you have not yet made Mr. Warner's acquaintance, step inside. If you have, you will find an old friend waiting by the fireside.

title: Best Practices Unveiled
author: Annette Eberhart
description: Empowering people to lead with purpose, grow with intention, and create lasting impact.

title: LifeCity: Unfilted Podcasts
author: Dave Unglert
description:
Welcome to the very first episode of LifeCity Unfiltered: Coffee & Questions!
What happens when followers of Jesus put away the script and simply have honest conversations? This podcast exists to create a space for real people to ask real questions, wrestle with real life, and pursue a real relationship with God together.

title: Raw News And Politics
author: Raw News And Politics
description: Raw News And Politics

title: Rearview Reviews
author: TESDCurator
description: Chris and Steph discuss first impressions of a movie on their drive home from the theater.

title: Guadalupedia
author: Guadalupe Missions
description:
A series discussing the history, miracles, science, and message of Our Lady of Guadalupe.

Featuring founder and director of Guadalupe Missions, Scott Watts and Fr. Brett Jamrog of the Archdiocese of Omaha.

title: The Workbench After-hours Podcast
author: Boomstick Tactical LLC
description: The Workbench After-hours is a podcast dedicated to 2A discussion and answering questions from our experience. We also dive into shop talk and everyday life experiences.

title: Raising Rock
author: Elise Orozco
description:
Motherhood is beautiful, messy, and—let’s be honest—overwhelming. Whether you’re home full-time, working 9-5, or somewhere in between, the responsibility of shaping your child’s heart can feel heavy. 
That’s why we created the Raising Rock Podcast—a space for honest, grace-filled conversations that equip you to raise children with respect, obedience, courage, and kindness.
Each episode tackles the real challenges of motherhood—faith, discipline, values, daily rhythms, friendship, extended family, lifestyle choices, and everything in between.
Let’s build homes where virtue takes root.

title: Author David Alexander Bestselling Thrillers
author: Author David Alexander
description:
David Alexander is a USA Today and New York Times bestselling author whose books have sold over five million copies. He is a graduate of Columbia University and Paris Sorbonne. David Alexander's novels and nonfiction titles have won critical acclaim from USA Today, The New York Times, The London Times, The Los Angeles Times, Publishers Weekly, The Wall Street Journal and many other venues in the US, UK, Canada and Australia.
His prizewinning thriller, Threatcon Delta: Assault on the Pentagon, reached first place on numerous bestseller lists including those of The New York Times and USA Today.

title: Book Buddies Podcast
author: Louisa Hammond
description: We discuss books from various years and do other fun activities involving books.

title: Auto Locksmith Kettering
author: autolocksmithkettering
description: Auto Locksmith Kettering is a trusted 24/7 mobile auto locksmith serving Kettering and Northamptonshire. We specialize in car key replacement, lost car key solutions, emergency vehicle lockouts, spare car keys, transponder key programming, non-destructive vehicle entry, car key cutting, replacement van keys, and Autowatch Ghost 2 Immobiliser Kettering installation. Our experienced locksmith provides fast on-site assistance for all vehicle makes and models using professional equipment. Whether you need emergency auto locksmith services, key programming, or replacement car keys in Kettering, we deliver reliable, affordable, and same-day solutions throughout the local area.

title: Batty on Air
author: Batty on Tour
description:
If you've ever chosen a hotel based on the thread count, argued about espresso extraction at breakfast, or wondered why the airline calls it "business class" when the experience is strictly economy of effort — Batty on Air is for you.
Travel, aviation, fine dining and facts that turn out to be wrong. Told by someone who has been there, eaten that, and has opinions about both.
You probably should have found this sooner. 🦇
battyontour.com

title: Sports Talk with Fresh Podcast
author: Brandon
description:
Brandon "Fresh" Williams has been all over the sports landscape. As a former owner of an Alabama football publication, Fresh has seen it all from big-time nationally televised matchups to the Heisman ceremony in New York, he's no stranger to the major happenings in sports. 


In 2018, Fresh was a part of basketball history by helping LaVar Ball start the first professional basketball league as an alternate to the NCAA in the Junior Basketball Association (JBA League) with a 16-year-old LaMelo Ball. 


Fresh has his own style and perspective when it comes to sports and if you are a sports lover, his passion and willingness to tell it like it is will leave you wanting more.

title: Shockwave Tissue Regeneration Therapy Podcast
author: Shockwave Tissue Regeneration Therapy Podcast - Hosted by Thomas Helfrich
description: The Shockwave Tissue Regeneration Therapy Podcast explores the truth in the science and clinical application of shockwave therapy. Hear from physicians, chiropractors, physical therapists, researchers, and industry experts as they discuss shock wave therapy in chiropractic, clinical evidence, treatment protocols, patient outcomes, sports medicine, orthopedics, rehabilitation, pain management, and regenerative medicine. Each episode delivers practical insights, emerging research, and best practices for clinicians and patients.

title: Forever Changed
author: Linda Miklas
description:
Hosted by Linda Miklas and Lisa Strutt, Forever Changed is a podcast that creates a space for people to share personal stories of transformation, ignited by a moment that rendered them Forever Changed. 
We have all had conversations, experiences, events, or pivot points that caused a significant shift in how we see ourselves or the world differently.
In each episode, Lisa and Linda are joined by a compelling guest to explore a specific and personal Forever Changed moment, shared with generosity and without pretense, each revealing a deepened sense of connection, possibility, and kindness.
Forever Changed is an invitation to pause, listen, and reflect; to be inspired by the moments that shape us. 
In season one, Forever Changed stories include discovering and pursuing purpose, loss, divorce, health advocacy, finding your voice, a health-imposed pivot, a diagnosis that reveals incredible inner strength, and adoption. One moment is all it takes to be Forever Changed.

title: Panel to Player
author: Q
description:
Panel to Player is a podcast all about the journey from comics to games and everything in between. We break down how superheroes, stories, and iconic characters make the jump from the page to the controller.
From deep dives into characters like Spider-Man and Batman to honest takes on the latest releases from Marvel and DC Comics, we cover what works, what doesn’t, and why.
If you’re into superheroes, comic books, video games, and everything nerd culture—this is the podcast for you.

title: POWER Pack Podcast
author: DaNel Hogan, Alison Smith, Kisha Davis-Caldwell, Jaymie Jacobs, Kate Nagle, Mary Bouley
description: The POWER Pack Podcast is a space for every woman — whether you're navigating the corporate ladder, building something of your own, or simply finding your footing through one of life's unexpected turns. Here, Professional, Outstanding Women Engaging in Resilience share the real, unfiltered truth of their journeys — naming the unique challenges women face and finding the beauty and wisdom in moments we didn't always choose. We bring together the stories of women from all walks of life to normalize the hard, honor the non-linear path of resilience, and remind you that your struggles and your strength are two sides of the same coin. Because when one woman tells her story honestly, every woman listening is given permission to step more fully into her own power and value. This is your invitation to listen, be inspired, and show up more unapologetically yourself.

title: Playce is where autonomous AI agents compete for real stakes - The Arena Report
author: White Cat Black Dog
description:
Playce is where autonomous AI agents compete for real stakes — and The Arena Report is your front-row seat.

Playce isn't your typical AI benchmark.

Forget static test scores and trivia leaderboards. Playce is the arena where AI models and autonomous agents have to be street smart — reading opponents, managing risk, bluffing, and adapting in real time, with real stakes on the line. In The Arena Report, hosts Ramsey and Kate break down the daily action: giant-killing upsets in rock-paper-scissors, high-pressure blackjack and poker hands, and live rankings that answer the question benchmarks can't — which model is actually better when it has to think on its feet?

DeepSeek, Grok, Gemini, GPT, Mistral, Llama — they all take the floor, and the board doesn't lie. No scripts, no spin. Real agents, real stakes, all on the board.

title: Night Talks Podcast
author: Kedibone
description: This show is all about having honest and deep conversations about what it truly means to live a sacrificial life unto God. We’ll be tackling topics such as anxiety and depression in the faith, friendship with the world and division in the church just to name a few. We’ll be asking questions like “is it all that people claim it to be or are there bits and pieces that are crying to be discussed and unraveled, but tossed to the side as a way to “seem” perfect?

title: Beyond Sunday
author: Asbury UMC
description: This podcast will be exploring the ways that you can take your faith journey beyond Sunday worship. Pastor Katie will be interviewing people within the church, offer insights in church decisions, share information on mission and ministry we have available and so much more!

title: The Real Suits
author: Saltz Mongeluzzi Bendesky
description: The Real Suits: Champions for the Injured provides a behind-the-scenes look into the lives of the attorneys who have been at the forefront of some of the most significant legal battles, driving change in industries, and advocating for those who need it most. Listeners will hear directly from attorneys about their unique paths into law, the cases that have shaped their careers, and their commitment to creating safer workplaces and industries through impactful legal action.

title: All Ironworkers Go to Hell
author: Jennifer
description: Join me in listening to my 20-year struggle with a bipolar, Narcissistic Alcoholic as I marry him and subsequently divorce him and the roller coaster he put me on until our last child was 18.

title: THE MIAMI RANT NEW PODCAST COMING SOON
author: pckr9rpwjq
description: A BRIEF INTRODUCTION ON WHAT YOU CAN EXPEXT TO HEAR IN THE COMING DAYS

title: Just Rambling The Podcast
author: Just Rambling The Podcast
description:
Welcome to Just Rambling. The name says it all.
This platform is a space to explore ideas, stories, and experiences without being confined to one topic or perspective. As a creative, I’m fascinated by people and the journeys that shape who they are.
Here, you’ll find conversations with individuals from different backgrounds and walks of life. Topics may range from fatherhood, leadership, relationships, and mental health to business, faith, community, and whatever else life brings.
At its heart, Just Rambling is about listening, learning, and creating space for meaningful dialogue.

title: 8 minute lives
author: Hugo W
description: **8 Minute Lives** tells the stories of remarkable people in the time it takes to drink a cup of coffee. Each episode delivers one life story - covering the defining moments, struggles, achievements, and choices that shaped a life and left a mark on history.

title: Got Mortgages Podcast
author: Abdel Khawatmi
description: Welcome to the Got Mortgages Podcast—your trusted source for mortgage education, weekly market updates, and expert insights. Whether you’re a first-time buyer, seasoned homeowner, or real estate pro, we break down complex topics into simple, actionable advice. Each week, we bring you the latest market trends and conversations with guest speakers from the housing and financial industries to help you stay informed and ahead of the curve. Tune in weekly for tips, updates, and strategies to navigate the ever-changing mortgage landscape!

title: Beyond Sunday with Pastor Mike
author: Mikie Howell
description: Faith was never meant to stay inside the church walls. Beyond Sunday with Pastor Mike brings biblical truth into everyday life through honest, practical conversations about following Jesus at home, at work, in relationships, and through life’s challenges. Each episode is rooted in Scripture, guided by the Holy Spirit, and designed to help you live with greater faith, purpose, and obedience long after Sunday service ends.

title: Everything about Buddhism
author: Samuca Armando
description: Come and learn about Buddhism.

title: Detours and Destinations Podcast
author: WTS Toronto - Detours and Destination
description: Detours & Destinations is a WTS podcast spotlighting the real career journeys of women across the transportation sector. We share candid stories, leadership lessons, and pivotal career moments from a diverse group of guests—representing different educational paths, ethnic backgrounds, career stages, and sectors of the industry. Designed for busy professionals, the podcast delivers meaningful insights you can take with you, wherever your path leads.

title: Not too late with Shannon Michaels
author: Shannon Michaels

title: Activate Health & Wellness
author: Dr. Celia Corbo
description:
Join Dr. Celia Corbo—licensed chiropractor, functional health practitioner, and entrepreneur—as she helps you optimize your body, balance your mind, and create vibrant health.

Through the three pillars of wellness—physical, chemical, and emotional—each episode offers practical tools and actionable steps to help you regulate your nervous system, boost your energy, and live your best life.

Tune in and activate the health and life you deserve!

title: This is a Date
author: Jo
description: Jo and Luke are a married couple who wait till the baby is down and then sit on the couch to chat about all things marriage, parenting, and pop culture. Jo is more up-to-date on what's going on in the general zeitgeist and loves to get Luke's hot (lukewarm?) takes as someone with basically no context. At the end of the day, this is not really about creating a perfect podcast. This is a date.

title: Ritual of desires
author: ashley
description: wrapped around chronic health neurodivergent submissive dominant switch bdsm being parent

title: Office Mommy Dearest
author: Jaide The Writer
description: If CEOs have podcasts to give them advice, why don't their assistants? Assistants do all the work anyway. Your Office Mommy takes you along as she welcomes her latest bundle of joy into the Chief Executive Officer position. As her title suggests, her job is to take care of her CEO's every need. If that means spying, lying, and crying; she's there to do it. Some might think her methods are too invasive or she's too involved. But when it comes to taking care of the boss: mother knows best. If the CEO would just let her in, office mommy wouldn't have to pry the door open. [a weekly micro podcast]

title: VANISHED
author: Cathal Burke
description: Vanished tells the true stories of lost places — cities buried by volcanoes, drowned by the sea, reclaimed by the jungle, or simply abandoned to the wind. A Roman town frozen in a single afternoon of ash. A vast temple-city emptied and swallowed by the forest. A great civilization on a river that disappeared so completely we still can't read its writing. A modern town abandoned in a single day. Host Nirob walks you through the rise, the life, and the disappearance of each place — what it was like when it was full of people, what brought it down, and what its ruins tell us now. Grounded, atmospheric, and always honest about what we know and what we don't. Clean and suitable for all ages. New place every week

title: Bible update
author: Samuel armando
description: Everything you need to know about Bible updates.

title: Gridiron Glamour The Intersection of Sports and Society
author: Launchpod Studio
description: Gridiron Glamour traces how American football stretches far beyond the line of scrimmage to shape culture, the economy, and identity in the United States. Blending historical context with present-day analysis, it examines how on-field performance intersects with fan rituals and loyalties, corporate money and media contracts, and social movements that have pushed the sport to reflect and influence national values. Expect thoughtful connections between game-day strategy and community traditions, stadium financing and local impacts, endorsements and branding, and moments of player activism that ripple through the wider public conversation. Grounded and curious rather than hype-driven, it looks closely at how the roar in the stands, the decisions in boardrooms, and the choices athletes make can remake what football means—and what it says about modern American life.

title: Fellowship Baptist Church - Sermons
author: Fellowship Baptist Church
description:
Sermons from the Sunday morning gathering of Fellowship Baptist Church, Jonesboro, Arkansas
Fellowship Baptist Church is proclaiming Christ for the maturity and joy of the Saints. 
For more info, reach out to us at admin@fellowshipbaptistar.com

title: Rest Meditation
author: Rest Meditation
description: Rest meditations

title: All About 1950's Rockabilly Rocker Bobby Poe
author: bobbypoe
description: Here you will find information about a man who spent his entire adult life in the music business. In his 50 years plus in that business, he had seen it all. He started out in the 1950's at age 22 as a performer and songwriter, then proceeded to become an artist manager, a record producer, a concert promoter and a music trade magazine publisher.

title: Vanshita podcast
author: vanshitaudaiwal
description: Mobzway Technologies is a global iGaming software development company specializing in casino software, sportsbook platforms, slot game development, lottery solutions, poker, bingo, and other gaming products. With expertise in custom and white-label solutions, Mobzway delivers secure, scalable, and feature-rich platforms tailored to the needs of startups and established operators. By combining innovative technology, seamless integrations, and dedicated technical support, Mobzway helps businesses launch high-performance gaming platforms that deliver engaging player experiences and long-term growth.

title: Commentary with Paige
author: Paige
description: Learn more about some of your favorite movies from your every day movie lover.

title: See you... Never!
author: Em
description:
See You… Never! is a weekly podcast where your silly blind host turns “blind leading the sighted” into comedy, chaos, and real talk. 
Expect different segments, unfiltered chats, and an Ask Me Anything section where no topic’s off limits. Life from a blind perspective, but funnier than you think.
You might see me later… but I’ll see you… Never!

title: No Asshole Policy
author: Angie, Christine, Gabrielle
description: Through lots of laughter, a few shady remarks, and a whole lot of love, three sisters share their experiences with a-holes. They'll be spilling details on how they navigate around it, when to call it out and when sometimes you just have to be one. Follow us at ----> Face book https://www.facebook.com/NoAholepolicy........Twitter https://twitter.com/noaholepolicy..... Instagram https://www.instagram.com/noaholepolicy/... or Drop us a line! info@noassy.com

title: Kozijnen Wijchen
author: Kozijnen Wijchen
description: Kozijnen Wijchen is dé specialist in hoogwaardige raamkozijnen voor woningen en bedrijven in Nederland. In onze podcast bespreken we alles over kozijnen, materialen, isolatie, duurzaamheid, onderhoud en de nieuwste ontwikkelingen binnen de branche. Onze afleveringen bieden praktische tips, deskundig advies en inspirerende inzichten om u te helpen de juiste keuzes te maken voor uw woning of project. Of u nu kiest voor kunststof, aluminium of houten kozijnen, Kozijnen Wijchen deelt waardevolle kennis gebaseerd op ervaring en vakmanschap. Luister mee en ontdek hoe kwalitatieve raamkozijnen bijdragen aan comfort, energiebesparing, veiligheid en een stijlvolle uitstraling van iedere woning.

title: The Wealth Map
author: The Wealth Map
description: Why do some nations become rich while others stay poor? The Wealth Map takes you inside the hidden economics of countries: the trade routes, resources, debts and decisions that decide who wins and who loses in the global economy. From Argentina's nine defaults to the melting Arctic's trillion-dollar shipping lanes, every episode maps one nation's economic story in about ten minutes — clear, fast and packed with numbers that will change how you see the world. New episodes several times a week. Also on YouTube: youtube.com/@WealthMapChannel

title: Dear Heavenly Father
author: Katie Epple
description: Hi ladies! Welcome to the Dear Heavenly Father podcast—a place for women pursuing the beauty in the hidden person of the heart. We believe Yeshua is our Lord and Savior and loving God means following His Torah in joyful obedience. If you have a desire to grow in your daily walk with the Lord and seek how to become more holy and set apart for Him, you've found the right place. Together, we'll discuss faith, obedience, femininity, and the refining work of God through every season of life.

title: Louisa Live
author: Louisa Sharamatyan
description:
Welcome to Louisa LIVE 🎙️
After years working in television, hosting on the red carpet, PR, and community events, Louisa Sharamatyan has met all types of people—and believes everyone has a story to tell, no matter the title.
She sits down with guests from all walks of life, diving into conversations about career, life, culture, and everything in between.
Real stories. Genuine moments. A little bit of everything.

title: Audio. GA4-240202501-AA1-EV02
author: Steven Cobo Velasco
description: Evidence GA4-240202501-AA1-EV02 Audio Script Part 1. Introduction Hello, everyone. My name is Steven Cobo Velasco. I am a student of the Technologist in Efficient Energy Management program at SENA. My training group number is 3335914. My English instructor is Sergio Hernán Guilombo Fracica. The name of this activity is Evidence GA4-240202501-AA1-EV02 – Audio. Today I am going to talk about my attitudes, beliefs, and obligations in my academic and work life. Part 2. Attitudes, Beliefs and Obligations I think that having a positive attitude is very important. I always try to be responsible, respectful, and honest. These attitudes help me learn new things and work well with other people. I believe that education can change our lives. I also believe that hard work and dedication help us achieve our goals. Learning new skills is important for my personal and professional future. In my academic life, I have to study every week. I have to complete my assignments on time and participate in all the learning activities. I must pay attention to my instructor and follow the course rules. I should practice English every day because it will help me communicate better in the future. In my work life, I work as a taxi driver. I have to be punctual, patient, and responsible. I must respect traffic rules and provide a safe and friendly service to my passengers. I should always be polite and help people when they need me. Finally, I believe that respect, discipline, honesty, and responsibility are essential values. If we have a positive attitude, study with dedication, and work hard every day, we can achieve our dreams and become better professionals. Thank you very much for listening.

title: The Light Within Us
author: Jordan Lightfoot
description: “The Light Within Us Podcast” is a faith-centered podcast that explores identity through Christ, the discipline required to glorify the Lord, and the realities of navigating ambition, relationships, and personal growth in the modern world. The heart of the podcast is the belief that the light of Christ lives within those who follow Him, shaping how we think, grow, and move through life. Through honest conversations and faith-centered storytelling, the platform reflects on both the challenges and the beauty of living out one’s faith while navigating the ups and downs of everyday life.

title: Unfiltered with Stephen & Lydia
author: Stephen & Lydia
description: Welcome to Unfiltered - a faith podcast for people who love Jesus but have questions for the church. Every week we get real about scripture, culture, doubt, deconstruction, leadership, and what it actually looks like to follow Christ in today's world. No fluff. No performance. Just honest faith.

title: Bramble and Bone Podcast
author: Bramble & Bone
description:
Step into the dark with me. Let’s see what we find when the fire dies down...
Hosted by KT, Bramble and Bone is an intimate, shadow-drenched journey into true crime, forgotten dark history, and eerie global folklore. While our roots lie deep in the misty hills, we wander wherever the mysteries are cold and the stories are haunting.
Each episode is a quiet ritual. Pour a warm cup of tea, light a single candle, and pull your chair closer to the hearth.
Subscribe now, and I'll see you in the next chapter, dear listener.

title: Young People Matters
author: Sabina Muchese
description:
Young People Matters is a youth-centered advocacy platform designed to amplify the voices
of young people and address issues affecting their everyday lives. The show focuses on
✓ Sexual Reproductive Health and Rights (SRHR)
✓ Gender Based Violence (GBV)
✓ Mental Health
✓ Financial Literacy
✓ Digital Literacy
✓ Governance and Youth Policies
The show creates a safe, engaging and informative space where young people can learn, share
experiences and engage in meaningful conversations that promote empowerment, dignity and
community well-being

title: Sunflowers & Saguaros: A Podcast Between Arizona & Ukraine
author: Olya & Andrew
description:
One of them grew up with sunflowers. The other, saguaros. Between them, we hope to strengthen the bridge between Arizona and Ukraine, one conversation at a time.

Between Sunflowers and Saguaros is hosted by me, Olya Johnson —a  Ukrainian American, community member and volunteer — and me, Andrew Ripley, an Arizonan who fell into Ukraine advocacy through friendship and never looked back. Each month, we sit down with the people who live this story: veterans, artists, refugees, educators, local leaders. People who know what it means to carry two places in their chest.

This is our podcast. And it's yours as well.

author: Marie-France Lalancette
description:
Is food getting too complicated for you? So complicated you have lost interest in trying to eat healthy? 
With my 30 years of clinical nutrition experience, I have seen it all. 
Every week, I share the Good, The Bad and The Ugly in the world of Nutrition so that you can start feeding yourself with joy and confidence again!
