author: LawSHIFT
description: On the AI for PI Index Podcast, we discuss the data and findings of LawSHIFT's AI for PI Index™ - the first of its kind, a weekly map of territory no one has charted before: what AI is actually saying and recommending to injured people across the US. We built it to help PI firms navigate the PI Market Siege and answer one question: how do we turn the window from injury to intake into an owned, algorithm-proof pipeline of predictable, high-value cases?

title: NBC Sports Boston Podcast Network
author: NBC Sports Boston
description: An aggregated “super feed” of NBC Sports podcasts, including “Tom Curran’s Patriots Talk, “The Next Pats Podcast” with Phil Perry, “Celtics Talk” podcast with Chris Forsberg, and “The Quick Snap with Brian Hoyer & David Andrews”. Fans can also subscribe to this feed for special segments from our programming, exclusive interviews, and other content.

title: PR Hype Girl
author: Kate Haranis
description:
We’ve been told, “just be yourself.” But we know it’s not that simple.

Not every room was made for us, rewards our full selves, or has even earned the right to see us in all of our unadulterated glory.

Choosing how we show up isn’t being fake; it’s being thoughtful.

The thing is, stories we tell to the world (and to ourselves) shape how we move, what we believe and who we become.

Instead of defining “authenticity” as all or nothing, let's just learn to tell better stories. (And yes, I think it’s that easy.)

PR Hype Girl is the space for those of us who want to choose when to play the game and when to change it. Part strategy, part pep talk, part conversation with that new friend who will hype you up like it's last call at a college bar bathroom (and just happens to be a 20-year comms and reputation expert).

Take a deep breath, and let’s dive in!

title: The Reset with Gabby Henriquez
author: Gabby Henriquez
description:
Weight Loss, Wellness, & the Messy Middle
After losing 145 pounds and reversing Type 2 diabetes without any GLP-1s or surgeries, Gabby Henriquez didn't find a perfect ending. Instead, she found a whole new life to figure out.
The Reset is an honest, unfiltered look at how weight loss actually affects your life. Gabby shares her own journey, alongside real stories from other people navigating the same path.
Topics include metabolic health, food freedom, running, body image, relationships after transformation, and the parts of weight loss nobody talks about. 
New episodes every Tuesday.

title: Messianic Mosaics
author: Rabbi Michael and Rabbi Carol Calise
description: Messianic Mosaics explores the Scriptures through a Messianic Jewish perspective, connecting the Torah, the Prophets, and the New Covenant to everyday life in Messiah Yeshua.

title: The Prickly Quill
author: Jeff Manning
description: The Prickly Quill is no-BS advice for finishing your novel, because nobody tells you how hard it actually is to get words on the page. Every week, Jeff Manning, indie developer and writer from Barrie, Ontario, cuts through the noise with practical tips, honest talk, and zero fluff. Whether you're stuck on chapter one or painted into a corner on chapter twenty, this is the show that gets you back to the keyboard. Brought to you by Quill Loop - the writing OS built for novelists who are serious about finishing.

title: Girl Get Real!
author: Hosted by Savanna
description: Real conversations, honest faith, and women who aren’t afraid to get real. This Christian podcast for women features inspiring interviews, authentic stories, and meaningful discussions about faith, life, relationships, purpose, and personal growth. Join us each week for encouragement, truth, laughter, and conversations that help women grow closer to God while navigating everyday life.

title: Between Two Palms
author: 4K1G 107FM
description:
Based in Townsville, Obi & Izzy bring big laughs and even bigger opinions to the mic. Best mates with a shared love of comedy and unapologetic hot takes, they dive into everything from pop culture chaos to everyday absurdities. Expect plenty of banter, a bit of roasting, and zero filter as they take the piss out of each other...and pretty much everything else. If you’re here for a laugh and don’t mind a few wild tangents, you’ve found your new favourite podcast.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Opportunity Intelligence Journal™
author: M.E. Crestwell Capital/Maxine Ebegbuzie
description:
The Value-Add Investor is now The Opportunity Intelligence Journal. In this first episode, Maxine Ebegbuzie explains why: what changed across months of research into valuation, underwriting, and portfolio decisions, and why property value alone stopped being the whole story.
She walks through a real CrestwellIQ property review, a building held by the same owner since the 1980s, with over 50% equity and a loan maturity approaching, that looked like a straightforward refinance on the surface. It wasn’t, once missing documentation and a deeper comparable analysis surfaced what the owner’s objective actually required. Plus, the three diagnostic questions worth running before any financing conversation: the owner’s true objective, the evidence behind the recommendation, and what an institutional underwriter would ask first.
In this episode:
Why this newsletter has a new name and a broader mission
A real property review where the obvious answer was the wrong one
Three questions to ask before any financing conversation
What’s coming: AVM cascades, the Five Layers of Opportunity Intelligence, Calculation Integrity, and more
New episodes every Wednesday morning. Read the companion piece at mecrestwellcapital.com/resources, or schedule a strategy conversation at mecrestwellcapital.com/contact.

title: Spiritual Deep Dive
author: Rabbi Derek "Dovid" Gormin
description:
Spiritual Deep Dive is dedicated to the thoughtful exploration of Penimiyus HaTorah - the inner dimension of spirituality. Through clear, practical, and inspiring learning, each episode seeks to uncover timeless wisdom that strengthens our relationship with The Almighty, deepens our understanding of ourselves, and enriches our daily lives.

Most episodes are approximately 10ish minutes, offering a word-by-word journey through foundational works of Jewish thought and Chassidus, together with practical applications for living a life of greater purpose, joy, and connection.

Whether you are taking your first steps into these profound teachings or have been learning them for years, our hope is that these conversations will inspire continued growth in Torah, Avodah, and Ahavas Yisroel.

Questions, comments, and feedback are always welcome at derek.gormin@gmail.com.

Please subscribe, share, and join us as we continue this journey together.


About Rabbi D. Gormin

Rabbi Derek "Dovid" Gormin is an educator, musician, speaker, and lifelong student of Torah with a passion for making the depth and beauty of Penimiyus HaTorah accessible and practical for contemporary life. He serves as Managing director for NCSY and Founding Dean of the JSU Global Campus. Rabbi Gormin lives in Los Angeles with his wife, Sarah Leah, and their five ridiculously cute children.


He believes that every person has infinite potential and that authentic Torah learning has the power to awaken that greatness within each of us.

title: Joyful in Jesus | Mindfulness, Transformation, Faith, Habit
author: Jeanette Finn - Joy Coach, Founder of Innocent Again, Author
description:
Do you ever feel like no matter how much you pray, serve, or give… it’s never enough? Do guilt, shame, and striving keep you running on empty? Maybe you’ve walked through heartbreak or loss, and now you wonder if real joy is even possible again. Do you long for peace that lasts — not just on Sundays, but right in the middle of your everyday life?
Welcome, sweet friend. Joyful in Jesus is your safe place to quiet the noise, heal your heart, and learn a simple, biblical way to renew your mind through God’s truth. Each episode will help you release guilt, silence negative self-talk, and reconnect with the deep peace and joy Jesus already purchased for you.
I’m Jeanette Finn — a woman of faith who’s walked through trauma, loss, and seasons where I felt unworthy and unseen. But God rebuilt my joy by transforming the way I think and the way I speak to myself. Now I’m here to share that same simple, life-giving process with you — rooted in His divine design and overflowing with grace.
If you’re ready to trade burnout and guilt for peace and purpose, you’re in the right place. Follow the show, and join me each week as we renew our minds, restore our peace, and rediscover joy — together, Joyful in Jesus. 💜

title: Geek Girls Story Salon
author: Jennifer L Giacalone
description: Writer and lifelong storyteller Jen Giacalone interviews creatives from across a variety of disciplines, from authors to actors to songwriters to filmmakers, about the art of storytelling.

title: The dice dynasty
author: Wolfie
description: A family of ttrpg players that navigate the crazy world of d and d

title: JaneWallStreet: At The Table
author: JaneWallStreet
description:
JaneWallStreet: At The Table is a podcast that explores the business and economics shaping the future of sports — through the lens of the women leading and driving it.
Hosted by Deirdre Lester, each episode brings together senior executives, operators, and investors for thoughtful, candid conversations on the decisions, strategies, and capital driving the industry forward. Focused on what’s actually working, what’s changing, and what comes next. From media and rights to ownership, investment, and growth, this is where perspective meets execution & where the business of sports looks different.

title: Extended Grace Church Plant Podcast
author: Vernon and Ashley Johnson
description: Extended Grace is the real-time, unfiltered story of Vernon and Ashley Johnson as they leave the life they knew to plant a church in South Charlotte, NC. Recorded as it happens, this podcast follows the calling, the doubts, and the everyday details of starting something from nothing. Whether you're following along, already part of the story, or dreaming of planting a church yourself one day, you'll get an honest look at what it really takes — the exciting parts and the hard ones. Learn more at extendedgracechurch.com.

title: Unmending Faith
author: Wanipa Ndhlovu
description:
I love God. I have questions. And that’s okay.
Unmending Faith is a space for faithful doubt and thoughtful belief. My name is Wanipa, and this podcast explores what it means to question deeply, hold tension, and revisit what we’ve always held about God, Scripture, and the church.
Through honest conversations and thoughtful reflection, it makes room for complexity, curiosity, and growth.
This is a journey without a guaranteed endpoint —but you’re welcome to come along.
Whether your faith feels uncertain, in-between, or even out of reach, you’re welcome here.

title: Outer Darkness Happy Hour Podcast
author: Outer Darkness Happy Hour Podcast
description:
Outer Darkness Happy Hour Podcast is where honest conversation meets storytelling over a drink. We explore life after belief, identity shifts, relationships, creativity, UFO talk, and rebuilding perspective while living in Utah and beyond. From faith transition to real-world experiences, nothing is off limits.
If you’re into faith deconstruction, Utah culture, UFO curiosity, storytelling, and honest talk about life and relationships, you’re in the right place.
Pour something, sit down, and join the conversation.

title: Wrinkles With Wisdom with David Lereah
author: David Lereah
description:
Wrinkles With Wisdom with David Lereah is a podcast about positive aging, purpose, resilience, connection, and joy.
Hosted by David Lereah, author of The Power of Positive Aging and founder of United We Age, this show explores the honest realities of growing older while celebrating the wisdom, humor, and strength that come with every stage of life.
Each week, David shares meaningful stories, expert insights, practical guidance, and heartfelt conversations about health, aging, loneliness, purpose, relationships, caregiving, gratitude, and the power of staying connected.
Positive aging does not mean pretending life is perfect. It means learning how to move forward with courage, curiosity, laughter, and dignity.
Because behind every wrinkle is a story, and every story still has so much more to offer.
Welcome to Wrinkles With Wisdom.

title: Conversations on AI
author: Conversationsonai podcast
description: Conversations on AI

title: The Lineup - Showpig.com
author: Showpig.com
description:
Designed for show pig enthusiasts, breeders, exhibitors, and families involved in the industry, The LineUp will feature conversations with industry leaders and innovators who are helping shape the future of the show livestock community. Along the way, the hosts will discuss current trends, share practical insights, tell stories from the road, and highlight the people who make the industry what it is.
Whether you're preparing for your next show season, looking to improve your program, or simply enjoy staying connected to the livestock industry, The LineUp aims to provide informative conversations, valuable perspectives, and a behind-the-scenes look at the people and ideas driving success.

title: バービー×イモトアヤコの東京ホルモン娘
author: TBS RADIO
description:
かつて「東京ホルモン娘」として活動していた2人が、Podcastで再集結。
お互い40代になった今。
健康も、お金も、美容も、仕事も、人生も。
落ち着くわけない40代の、まだまだ止まらない多種多様な「欲」をムキ出しにして語り合います。
出演：バービー／イモトアヤコ

番組HP： https://www.tbsradio.jp/horumon-musume/　instagram：https://www.instagram.com/horumon_musume/

title: I Don't Wanna Talk To You!
author: Richard Renz and Felica Duce
description: This is a podcast about mental health for people who’ve been told to “just talk about it” one too many times. No toxic positivity. No inspirational quotes. Just real conversations and dark humor. A podcast about therapy, trauma, and what happens when the system confuses compliance with healing. If you’ve ever been forced to “process your feelings,” this one’s for you. Welcome to I Don't Wanna Talk To You. We're glad you're here—even if you didn't wanna be. Disclaimer: This podcast and show notes are for informational and entertainment purposes only. Visit visions-counseling.com for more info.

title: A Stellar Insight
author: Ezra
description: Science And technology, Spirituality And The Universe

title: My Brothers Boy
author: Teko And Duece
description: Welcome to My Brother’s Boy—the podcast where an uncle and nephew break down sports, music, relationships, internet culture, and the random questions everybody argues about but never has the answers to. From blind rankings and WWYD scenarios to GOAT debates and hot takes, every episode feels like sitting in on a conversation you weren’t supposed to hear.

title: Off Tha Record Podcast
author: Jay Mack
description:
Off Tha Record is where real conversations live. We talk life, culture, relationships, music, and everything in between — unfiltered and unapologetic. Nothing is scripted, nothing is sugarcoated. Just honest opinions, different perspectives, and conversations people are already having… just not always out loud.
If it’s trending, controversial, inspiring, or personal — we’re speaking on it. This is the space where culture meets real life.

title: Country Soul with Jamie and Jay
author: Jamie and Jay Santilli
description:
Explore the heart and soul of country music with hosts Jay and Jamie Santilli. 

This podcast brings you authentic conversations with performers, songwriters, and enthusiasts, providing a genuine look into the rich tapestry of the genre. Join us for engaging discussions, fun anecdotes, and a celebration of all things country music. Subscribe now to be part of a community where passion meets authenticity.  

Tune in and immerse yourself in the genuine spirit of "Country Soul"!

title: Milk Toast
author: KY3
description: Welcome to the most mediocre morning show you’ve ever seen! Ever wanted an experience that you never asked for? PERFECT!! Welcome to Milk Toast, The morning show you didn’t ask for!!!

title: 9 av and Co
author: Floriane Claire Coopaname CHINSKY
description: faire face aux catatrophes

title: 9umba 9umba Moments
author: Thabiso
description: Welcome to the ultimate rhythm journey. Every week, Teza delivers a fresh, uninterrupted mix of the hottest underground sounds, and exclusives . Whether you're hitting the gym, getting ready for the weekend, or just vibing, this is your soundtrack. Subscribe now and let the music play.

title: The Yankovictionary
author: OccaOnAir
description:
This is a weekly podcast where I randomly select a Weird Al Yankovic song and talk about it. This podcast may have have slightly inappropriate terms, so I would only recommend for people above 9 years old.
Enjoy listening, have a nice day and stay weird!

title: The Holy Ghost Action Campaign Series
author: Charismatic Evangelistic Ministry
description: The Holy Ghost Action Campaign Series features powerful messages, worship, and life-changing moments from the annual Holy Ghost Action Campaign hosted by the Charismatic Evangelistic Ministry (CEM) in Accra, Ghana. Led by Rev. Steve Mensah and Rev. Eastwood Anaba, this revival is centered on prayer, the Word, worship, and the transforming power of the Holy Spirit. Be inspired, strengthened, and equipped to pursue God's presence and live a Spirit-filled life.

title: Life Had Other Ideas
author: Phil Beastall
description: Life Had Other Ideas is a podcast exploring how ordinary people adapt when life doesn’t go to plan. Through honest, thoughtful conversations, guests share the experiences that shaped them, the challenges they faced, the lessons they learned, and the perspectives they’ve gained along the way. Every story is different, but each offers a glimpse into what it means to navigate the twists and turns of life.

title: Medical Practice Growth
author: John V
description: The show for interventional pain practices that want more consults and procedures on the schedule. I'm John Verdyan. I run paid patient acquisition for insurance-based clinics every single day: real budgets, real consults, real procedures booked. Here I break down what fills procedure days: ads built for pain patients, intake that screens out med-seekers, follow-up that carries patients through both diagnostic blocks, and reporting your practice can bill against. SCS, RFA, Intracept, Vertiflex, SI fusion. One problem per episode, 20 to 30 minutes. For pain practice owners and administrators.

title: Midwest Bettys
author: Midwest Bettys
description: Two midwest barrel racers decided to start a podcast to talk about topics related to the horse industry with hopes to help beginner barrel racers and others struggling with finding their way in the horse industry.

title: Culture of Paint
author: Drew Toynbee
description: Culture of Paint is a hobby podcast for miniature enthusiasts that focuses on painting. Hosted by award winning painters Henry Steele and Andy Wardle

title: I'd Love to Chat... with The Luvely Rae
author: The Luvely Rae
description: Welcome, let's have a chat. If you've ever had a chance to chat with The Luvely Rae at one of her New York City shows, then you may recall that she is always more than happy to discuss the little things, and as always to hear your thoughts. In this podcast The Luvely Rae (a rather lovely intellectual ecdysiast) invites you stay awhile for a brief conversation on the cultures and cultural changes. The thought provoking topics are meant to be conversation starters, and are provided akin to the popular weather girls of 1955 and the stimulating interludes of Gypsy Rose Lee. If there's a topic you'd like to chat about, feel free connect.

title: Beau on Biography
author: Sarah Beaupre
description: Every remarkable life has a story worth telling. Join host Sarah Beaupre as she explores the lives of artists, writers, musicians, world leaders, scientists, saints, and other fascinating people whose stories shaped our world. Through thoughtful storytelling and carefully researched narratives, Beau on Biography goes beyond the headlines to discover the human beings behind history—revealing the moments, relationships, and choices that continue to inspire us today. History gives us names, stories give us people.

title: The Mindset Generation
author: Adela Warkentin
description:
The world knows what they have achieved. This is who they really are.
Adela Warkentin, a sought-after mindset and executive coach, sits down with athletes, entrepreneurs, scientists, and thought leaders for conversations that reach past the résumé and into the person. Guests have included Bob Roth, CEO of the David Lynch Foundation, and Super Bowl champion Robert Turbin. Each episode moves beyond what they've achieved to explore who they are: the values that shaped them, the meaning behind what they built, and where they stand in life today. Together we explore human beyond achievement.

title: En ruta. Un viaje con quienes van de viaje.
author: La Radio Tomada
description:
Una iniciativa de la Unidad de Comunicaciones de Organización Internacional para las Migraciones en El Salvador, destinada a sensibilizar e informar sobre cuestiones migratorias. El pódcast busca desmitificar la migración, rompiendo con las narrativas simplistas y estigmatizantes en el discurso público y mediático.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Warren County Sports Authority Show
author: Jeffery Simmons
description: Join Jeff Simmons, Chris Sullens and Trevor Evans as they talk Warren County sports, life and everything else!

title: Balancing Unhinged
author: Amber H. Shah
description:
Welcome to Balancing Unhinged with Amber Shah, the Shah of Saint Augustine.
Amber is a mother of two, Licensed Florida Realtor®, Registered Sivananda Yoga Teacher, Reiki Healer, NASM Certified Nutrition Coach, Personal Trainer, Group Exercise Instructor, author of Yoga in Sales, world traveler, trophy wife, and proudly unhinged elder millennial navigating life in the 21st century.
This podcast explores the intersection of real estate, wellness, motherhood, personal growth, spirituality, business, community, and everyday chaos. Join Amber now!

title: rebekah's Journey
author: rebekah's Journey
description: She left everything she knew—her family, her home, her future—to follow a divine calling she could not fully see. Rebekah's journey is one of faith, trust, and the courage to say "yes" when the path ahead was uncertain. Chosen to become the wife of Isaac and the mother of nations, her story reveals how God weaves ordinary lives into extraordinary purposes. From a simple act of kindness at a well to becoming a matriarch of Israel, Rebekah's steps were ordered by heaven. This episode explores her legacy of faith, her pivotal role in biblical history, and the power of choosing God's plan over comfort. Faith, divine appointment, biblical women, God's guidance, and the journey of obedience.

title: The Tech Side of Life
author: Soul Driven Studios
description: The Tech Side of Life is the podcast where technology meets humanity. Hosted by Akil Johnson and Jermaine Cobbs, we explore AI, emerging tech, productivity, creativity, communication, and digital culture through the lens of everyday life. Instead of chasing hype, we ask a simple question: does it actually make life better? Through insightful conversations, humor, and real-world stories, we examine how technology shapes the way we live, work, create, and connect. Technology gives us the topic. Humanity gives us the meaning.

title: The Archive
author: Sarah Ryan Davis and Dr. Pia Taylor
description: The Archive is a modern gallery where stories become memory stones. Conversations, testimonies, and real talk — all pointing back to Jesus. Because what the Lord has done is worth remembering.

title: The Brick Wall
author: Media Thesis
description:
The Brick Wall is the completely unscripted, poorly rehearsed and barely produced podcast of Media Thesis, a performance marketing agency that does media a whole lot better than they do content.
Hosted by Chris Sullivan and Bauer Fichter, each episode features candid conversations, sometimes with actual industry leaders, and the people building what’s next in marketing, media, AI, and business growth. The Brick Wall breaks through the real stories behind modern business success - the wins, the pivots, and the strategies that actually moved the needle.

title: ZAIDYN Insights
author: ZAIDYN by ZS
description: ZAIDYN Insights is a podcast exploring how AI, data and connected intelligence are transforming life sciences. Through conversations with ZS experts, industry leaders, clients and guest voices, each episode shares practical insights on commercial strategy, medical affairs, clinical development, patient engagement and the evolving role of AI in driving smarter decisions. Presented by ZAIDYN, the life sciences intelligence platform from ZS.
